context: Province hover hint in the holder map mode, when the player's own house holds the province directly.
Province hover hint in the holder map mode, when the province is held by a house outside the player's chain of vassalage. {holder} is a house or organisation name.
Province hover hint in the holder map mode, when nobody holds the province.
Province hover hint when the province is held one step down the player's chain of vassalage. {holder} is a house or organisation name.
english: [Held by {holder}, 1 step down your chain of vassalage]

context: Plural form of ui.map-mode.holder.hint.vassal.one; {hops} is 2 or more.
english: [Held by {holder}, {hops} steps down your chain of vassalage]

context: Short value shown on the province itself in the holder map mode when the player holds it directly.
Short value shown on the province in the holder map mode when a vassal holds it. {holder} is a house or organisation name.
